products.title: Custom Brand 10,000mAh Power Bank
products.desc: Sleek, durable, and high-capacity metallic power bank for the modern professional. Laser-etched branding on brushed aluminum ensures your logo leaves a lasting impression.

products.title: Executive Bamboo Wireless Charging Pad
products.desc: Eco-friendly 15W fast-charging wireless charger for a clutter-free, productive workspace. Natural bamboo surface with custom logo engraving — where tech meets sustainability.

products.title: Metal Ring Bluetooth Speaker & Mic
products.desc: Compact, water-resistant premium metal speaker for seamless music and hands-free conference calls. Pairs in seconds via Bluetooth 5.2 — a statement gift for top performers.

products.title: Smart Power Bank Executive Organizer Planner
products.desc: Luxury folder diary containing a built-in 8,000mAh power bank, secure multi-cable charging ports, and internal card slots.

products.title: Premium Multi-Device Fast Charge Hub
products.desc: Tough nylon braided multi-connector charging cable matching all modern devices. Full corporate logo plate decoration.

products.title: B2B High-Performance Tower Air Cooler
products.desc: Slim institutional tower air cooler with high efficiency honeycomb cooling pads. Energy efficient for institutional bulk setups.

products.title: Insulated Hydro Vacuum Flask (500ml)
products.desc: Insulated, premium double-wall flask that keeps drinks hot 12 hours, cold 24 hours. Gold-embossed corporate branding on a matte-black finish — elegance at every sip.

products.title: Coffee Husk Reusable Coffee Cup
products.desc: Biodegradable coffee cup crafted from authentic agricultural waste coffee husks. Durable, leak-proof, BPA-free, and micro-wave safe.

products.title: Double-Walled Steel Sipper Tumbler
products.desc: Professional double-walled stainless steel sipper with flip lid. Fits standard car cup holders. Perfect desk partner.

products.title: Premium Bamboo Thermos Flask
products.desc: Stunning double-walled stainless steel interior wrapped in an organic bamboo casing. Includes a built-in steel tea infuser.

products.title: Elite Cork Cover Planner & Organizer
products.desc: A5 executive diary with a soft-touch organic cork cover. Includes a matching bamboo stylus ball pen and business card slots.

products.title: Solid Oak Desk Organizer & Pen Stand
products.desc: Handcrafted solid wood desktop organizer. Features phone docking slot, watch cradle, paperclip tray, and dual pen holder.

products.title: Organic Jute & Canvas Shopper Tote
products.desc: Heavy-duty canvas shopping bag with thick organic jute side panels and soft padded cotton handles. Excellent large branding area.

products.title: 100% Natural Bamboo Cutlery Set
products.desc: Reusable lightweight travel utensils set. Includes bamboo fork, knife, spoon, chopsticks, and straw inside a cotton pouch.

specs.Utensils: Bamboo Spoon, Knife, Fork, Chopsticks, Straw

products.title: Recycled Kraft Notebook & Seed Paper Pen Set
products.desc: Recycled paper binder notebook accompanied by plantable seed paper pens. Grow tomatoes or basil once the pen runs out.

specs.Pen: Bio-degradable paper body with seed capsule

products.title: Custom Premium Golf Umbrella
products.desc: Extra Large double-canopy design. Windproof fiberglass frame protects against heavy gales. Complete print branding.

products.title: Auto Open folding Compact Umbrella
products.desc: Convenient one-touch button automatic opening frame. Lightweight 3-fold steel layout fits easily in laptop packs.

products.title: Reverse Closing Drip-Free Umbrella
products.desc: Innovative inverted design trapping rain water inside. Self-standing handsfree C-shaped handle grip.

products.title: Full-Length Heavy Commuter Raincoat
products.desc: Heavy-duty waterproof raincoat with full leakproof sealed seams and double-flap front snap closure. Perfect commuter wear.

products.title: Reflective Heavy Duty Safety Rain Suit
products.desc: High visibility reflective safety strips integrated onto jacket and trousers. Crucial for warehouse, safety and transport teams.

products.title: Kids Safety Colorful Hooded Umbrella
products.desc: Child-safe rounded tips and easy squeeze-proof open slide. Vibrant customizable cartoon shapes and brand labels.

products.title: Emergency Pocket-Size Hooded Poncho
products.desc: Extremely lightweight pocket-sized disposable hooded poncho. Designed as low-cost giveaways for marathons and corporate events.

products.title: Anti-Theft Executive Laptop Backpack
products.desc: Secure design with concealed zipper sliders and cut-resistant layers. Includes built-in external USB charger output cord.

products.title: Premium Cabin Hardshell Spinner Suitcase
products.desc: Rugged polycarbonate hardshell carry-on luggage. Equipped with 360-degree silent dual spinner wheels and integrated TSA lock.

products.title: Tactical Gym & Travel Duffle Bag
products.desc: Heavy-duty canvas weekend duffle with dual carry straps, expandable side compartments, and dedicated moisture-sealed shoe pockets.

products.title: 2-in-1 Wheeled Trolley Backpack
products.desc: Versatile executive hybrid bag functioning as a backpack and a pull-along cabin spinner with retractable trolley handle.

products.title: Premium Tipped Collar Polo T-Shirt
products.desc: 220 GSM pre-shrunk combed organic cotton polo. Perfect stitching, elegant side slits, and highly durable custom embroidery of your logo.

products.title: Fleece-Lined Weatherproof Corporate Jacket
products.desc: Windproof fleece-lined premium weather-resistant winter jacket. Elastic wind-cuffs and secure inside smartphone slots.

products.title: Classic Twill Structured Cotton Cap
products.desc: Vibrant structured six-panel twill cotton cap with brass metal slide adjustment strap. Breathable stitched ventilation eyes.

products.title: Eco-Conscious Recycled Poly Polo T-Shirt
products.desc: High-performance moisture-wicking polo constructed entirely from ocean-recycled PET bottles. Helps companies achieve green mandates.

products.title: Royal Mysore Gold Sweets & Nuts Combo Box
products.desc: A gourmet Diwali celebration in a gold-foiled box — premium cashews, almonds, pistachios, organic forest honey, handmade chocolates, and a traditional brass diya. Pure festive delight.

specs.Sweets: Mysore Pak & Premium Cashew Kaju Katli

products.title: Premium Copper Carafe & Tumbler Set
products.desc: Exquisite handcrafted 99.9% pure copper drinkware set in a velvet-lined sandalwood box. A luxurious Ayurvedic wellness gift that speaks to heritage, health, and thoughtfulness.

products.title: Gifting Needs Custom Corporate Gift Box
products.desc: Handcrafted luxury corporate custom gift box combining a thermal steel bottle, matte black planner, and executive stylus pen.

products.title: Premium New-Hire Onboarding Welcome Box
products.desc: Exquisite luxury presentation cardboard box packing a high-end laptop backpack, unbleached cork notebook, and thermal steel mug.

specs.Contents: Laptop pack, Cork Diary, Insulated mug

products.title: Prestige Executive Leatherette Stationery Set
products.desc: Elegantly matching leatherette workspace gift set matching a premium folder cover diary, executive metal cardholder, and leather keychain.

products.title: Premium Doctor Executive Leather Portfolio Folder
products.desc: Classy leather folder portfolio designed for doctors and pharma executives. Holds prescription tablets, pads, and stethoscopes.

specs.Compartments: Prescription pad sleeve, phone pouch, pen slot

products.title: Pharma Specialized Rotating Desk Organizer
products.desc: Custom rotating plastic and metal desk organizer stand printed with brand labels and medical guides. Holds prescription pens.

products.title: Doctor Custom Printed Prescription Pads (Bulk)
products.desc: Premium writing paper pads printed with clinical details and company branding. Smooth texture optimized for fast handwriting.

products.title: Stethoscope Hard Shell Protective Carry Case
products.desc: Shockproof EVA hardshell carry case protecting delicate clinical stethoscopes. Mesh pockets organize clinical thermometers.

products.title: Hospitality Premium Guest Toiletries Gift Kit
products.desc: Classy travel-ready guest toiletries box set combining organic botanical soaps, mini shampoos, dental kits, and shaving accessories.

specs.Pouch: Clear waterproof EVA zip slider bag
specs.Contents: Botanical soap, shampoo, conditioner, dental pack

products.title: Luxury Combed Cotton Hotel Towel Set
products.desc: Ultra-plush highly absorbent 100% combed cotton bath towels featuring fine dobby borders and prominent embroidered hotel brand emblem.

products.title: Ceramic Bathroom Soap Dispenser & Tumbler Set
products.desc: Artisanal hand-crafted ceramic bathroom dispenser set customized with hotel properties logos. Premium metallic liquid pump head.

specs.Set: Dispenser pump + toothbrush tumbler + soap dish

products.title: Corporate Nylon Lanyard & Satin Ribbon ID Set
products.desc: Premium satin-finish polyester lanyards custom printed with corporate brand repeating slogans. Premium chrome metal clip hook.

specs.Holder: Clear acrylic thick ID card cardholder

products.title: Custom Printed A4 Event Presentation Ring Binder
products.desc: Heavy-board rigid presentation ring binder folder wrapped in customized vinyl graphics. Fitted with standard 2-ring snap lever clip.

products.title: Executive Metal Stylus Pen with Laser Engraving
products.desc: Fine metal ballpoint pen combining an integrated capacitive screen stylus tip for smartphones and tablet panels. Sleek brass barrel.

inquiries.name: Rohan Sharma
inquiries.summary: Box: Kraft Sustainable Box (₹90) | Items: Metal Stylus Pen, Organic Cork Diary, Smart Vacuum Mug (350ml) | Quantity: 150 | Est. Cost: ₹1,21,776
inquiries.message: Need standard embossing of TCS logo on the cork notebook and laser engraving on the insulated mug. Individual shipping to 5 different regional offices required.

inquiries.name: Anjali Nair
inquiries.productDetails: Custom Brand 10,000mAh Power Bank (Est. Price: ₹649 | MOQ: 50)
inquiries.message: We require 40 units for an executive client visit this Friday. Willing to pay extra custom setup fees for quick 3-day turnaround.

slides.title: Elevate Your Corporate Relationships Forever
slides.desc: Make a lasting impression on day-one. Premium branded welcome kits with tech gadgets, planners, and luxury packaging that your team will genuinely love.

slides.title: Tech Gifts That Command Attention
slides.desc: Laser-engrave your logo on slim gold power banks, bamboo wireless chargers, and Bluetooth speakers. Gifts that are used daily — keeping your brand top of mind.

slides.title: Hydration Gifts They'll Use Every Single Day
slides.desc: Matte black gold-embossed vacuum flasks, pure copper Ayurvedic sets, and biodegradable coffee husk cups — functional luxury at every sip.

slides.title: Premium Stationery for the Modern Executive
slides.desc: Cork-cover A5 planners with Smyth-sewn lay-flat binding, bamboo gold-accent pens, and solid oak desk organizers. Gifts that reflect serious business culture.

slides.title: Gifts That Show You Care About the Planet
slides.desc: Seed paper planters, cork diaries, biodegradable cups, and zero-waste kraft boxes. Reinforce your CSR commitment with every thoughtful gift.

slides.title: Royal Gourmet Hampers for Every Festival
slides.desc: Gold-foiled Diwali boxes with premium dry fruits, organic forest honey, handmade chocolates, and a traditional brass diya — pure festive delight.

slides.title: Luxury Leather Accessories, Personalised
slides.desc: Handcrafted vegan leather laptop sleeves, cardholders, and passport wallets with precision laser-etched corporate logos. Executive gifting elevated.

slides.title: Branded Apparel That Builds Team Pride
slides.desc: 220 GSM organic cotton polo t-shirts, caps, and winter hoodies with high-density custom embroidery. Wear your brand with pride, every day.

slides.title: Awards That Inspire Peak Performance
slides.desc: Reward milestones with high-clarity K9 crystal 3D laser-etched trophies on mahogany wood bases. Recognition that motivates the entire team.

slides.title: Practical Gifts That Last a Lifetime
slides.desc: Copper kitchenware, premium customized umbrellas, and personalized wall clocks — utility gifts that your clients will display at home with pride.

about.heroDesc: Established in 2018 in Bengaluru, Gifting Needs set out with a simple mission: to elevate the quality, appeal, and experience of corporate gift giving in India. From welcome boxes to high-fidelity tech hampers, we manage curation, packaging, and individual doorstep fulfillment.
about.valuesDesc: We follow strict processes to ensure your company logo is rendered with utmost precision and beauty across all product surfaces.

values.title: Triple Stage Quality Checks
values.desc: Every diary binding, power bank battery, and mug insulated seal is verified by hand prior to box arrangement and dispatch.

values.title: Surfaced Brand Precision
values.desc: Using fiber laser engravers for metal cups, custom screen printing for notebooks, and Japanese sewing machines for polo embroidery.

values.title: Sustainable Alternatives
values.desc: We offer a vast selection of organic cork cover planners, bamboo desk holders, husk drinkware, and fully recyclable kraft boxes.

timeline.title: Inception
timeline.desc: Founded Gifting Needs in Bengaluru with standard office stationery items, catering to local IT startups.

timeline.title: Tech Integration
timeline.desc: Expanded catalog to power banks, Bluetooth audio speakers, and customized tech utilities for virtual onboarding.

timeline.title: Green Initiative
timeline.desc: Introduced organic bamboo and cork stationery ranges. Designed welcome kit builder models for remote employees.

timeline.title: Nationwide Scale
timeline.desc: Fulfilling bulk shipments to over 200+ companies with automated warehouse dispatch and tracking support.

faqs.question: What is the Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)?
faqs.answer: To sustain custom printing and production setups, our MOQ is 50 units for tech, apparel, and stationery products, and 25 units for curated festive hampers or welcome kit boxes. For quantities below this, a setup fee of ₹2,500 is applied.

faqs.question: Can you dispatch kits directly to remote employee homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, absolutely! We manage individual courier fulfillment across India. You provide the address sheet, and we package, seal, track, and ship each kit directly to the employee's doorstep, sending you a unified tracking dashboard.

faqs.question: How does custom brand logo printing work?
faqs.answer: Once you submit your vector logo (PDF, AI, or EPS format), our designer generates a digital sample mock-up within 4 hours. Upon approval, we use suitable methods: laser engraving for stainless bottles/pens, screen printing for diary covers, and thread embroidery for fabrics.

faqs.question: Do you ship physical product samples?
faqs.answer: Yes. We ship physical unbranded samples for quality verification (charged at standard single unit cost). For confirmed orders exceeding 100 boxes, we ship a fully customized branded sample box for physical verification prior to mass production.

faqs.question: What are the corporate payment terms?
faqs.answer: Our standard billing terms require a 50% advance payment to initiate production and customization. The remaining 50% balance payment is settled upon quality check certification and dispatch, prior to shipment arrival. We accept bank NEFT, RTGS, UPI, and major corporate cards.

solutions.title: Build Your Custom Corporate Gift Box
solutions.desc: Design a bespoke Welcome Kit or Employee Hamper. Select your gift box styling, select products to fill it, adjust quantity, and submit for a formal mock-up quote.
